text.title: funnel-tactics-advanced Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for funnel-tactics-advanced as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Sending identical messaging to all retargeting segments regardless of where they dropped off.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A cart abandoner needs a different message than a pricing-page abandoner. Irrelevant retargeting increases unsubscribe rate and wastes ad budget.
